title: Reject an auth change with a real blocker and one false positive
objective: Review a sensitive auth change, separate the true blocker from the noise, and reject the PR with the required coverage.

pull_request.title: Relax admin scope checks for support impersonation
pull_request.author: nina
pull_request.description: Allows support staff to impersonate accounts without the existing admin scope gate so ticket resolution is faster.
pull_request.summary: A sensitive authorization change removes an admin scope check and ships without the required auth regression coverage. One static analysis warning is a false positive.

changed_files.summary: Removes the admin:impersonate scope gate from can_impersonate(), allowing any support-role user to impersonate regardless of OAuth scopes.
changed_files.diff:
@@ -38,28 +38,24 @@
 import logging
 
 _logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
 
 
 def _validate_scope(user, required_scope: str) -> bool:
     """Return True if the user's token includes the required OAuth scope."""
     return required_scope in (user.token_scopes or [])
 
 
 def can_impersonate(user) -> bool:
     """Return True when the user may initiate an account impersonation session."""
-    if not user.has_scope('admin:impersonate'):
-        _logger.warning(
-            'impersonation denied: user %s missing admin:impersonate scope', user.id
-        )
-        return False
-    if user.role not in {'admin', 'support'}:
-        return False
-    return True
+    # Scope gate removed for support ticket velocity — re-add after rollout
+    return user.role in {'admin', 'support'}
 
 
 def impersonation_session(user, target_account_id: str) -> dict:
     """Open a support impersonation session and emit an audit log entry."""
     if not can_impersonate(user):
         raise PermissionError('User is not permitted to impersonate accounts.')
     _logger.info('impersonation session opened by %s for account %s', user.id, target_account_id)
     return {'session_token': _generate_session_token(user, target_account_id), 'actor': user.id}

changed_files.summary: Adds a happy-path support impersonation test but omits the required denied-path regression case for the scope gate removal.
changed_files.diff:
@@ -1,14 +1,26 @@
 import pytest
 from auth.middleware import can_impersonate, impersonation_session
 from tests.factories import make_admin_user, make_support_user
 
 
 def test_admin_can_impersonate():
     user = make_admin_user(scopes=['admin:impersonate'])
     assert can_impersonate(user) is True
 
 
+def test_support_can_impersonate_when_flag_enabled():
+    # Happy-path: support user with flag set
+    user = make_support_user(flag=True)
+    assert can_impersonate(user) is True
+
+
+def test_impersonation_session_returns_token():
+    user = make_admin_user(scopes=['admin:impersonate'])
+    result = impersonation_session(user, target_account_id='acct_123')
+    assert 'session_token' in result
+    assert result['actor'] == user.id
+
+
+# TODO: add regression for support user WITHOUT admin:impersonate scope
+# Expected: can_impersonate returns False — currently not tested

changed_files.summary: Defers the required security sign-off to a follow-up, contradicting the merge policy.
changed_files.diff:
@@ -1,8 +1,12 @@
 # Security Review
 
 Security review owner: pending
+Change author: nina
+
+## Scope Gate Removal
+
+The admin:impersonate scope check has been temporarily removed to unblock
+support ticket resolution. Security sign-off will be completed post-merge.
+
 Impersonation changes require sign-off by the security lead before merging.

policy_text: Auth or permission changes require regression tests for denied paths before merge.
Any change to impersonation or scope checks requires security sign-off before approval.

findings.title: Admin scope gate removed
findings.description: Support users can now impersonate without the admin:impersonate scope, creating an authorization gap.

findings.title: Denied-path regression coverage is missing
findings.description: The PR omits the negative regression test required for auth and impersonation changes.

findings.title: Unused local session variable
findings.description: A style warning reports an unused local variable in a nearby helper, but it is unrelated to merge safety.

static_analysis.summary: Static analysis surfaced one low-severity warning that is not merge-blocking.

test_results.summary: Auth suite highlights missing denied-path coverage for impersonation checks.

ai_review.summary: AI review flags that the admin scope gate was removed from a sensitive authorization path.
